pg142-p1-s2: A firm attitude at this point has helped many of us.
pg142-p1: drink. A firm attitude at this point has helped many of us.
pg142-p2-s1:
Next he can be assured that you do not intend to lecture, moralize, or condemn; that if this was done formerly, it was
because of misunderstanding.
pg142-p2-s2: If possible express a lack of hard feeling toward him.
pg142-p2-s3:
At this point, it might be well to
explain alcoholism, the illness.
pg142-p2-s4:
Say that you believe he is a gravely ill person, with this qualification - being
perhaps fatally ill, does he want to get well?
pg142-p2-s5:
You ask, because many alcoholics, being warped and drugged, do not want
to quit.
pg142-p2-s7: Will he take every necessary step, submit to anything to get well, to stop drinking forever?
pg142-p2:
Next he can be assured that you do not intend to lecture, moralize, or condemn; that if this was done formerly, it was
because of misunderstanding. If possible express a lack of hard feeling toward him. At this point, it might be well to
explain alcoholism, the illness. Say that you believe he is a gravely ill person, with this qualification - being
perhaps fatally ill, does he want to get well? You ask, because many alcoholics, being warped and drugged, do not want
to quit. But does he? Will he take every necessary step, submit to anything to get well, to stop drinking forever?
pg142-p3-s1:
If he says yes, does he really mean it, or down inside does he think he is fooling you, and that after rest and
treatment he will be able to get away with a few drinks now and then?
pg142-p3-s2:
We believe a man should be thoroughly probed on
these points.
pg142-p3-s3: Be satisfied he is not deceiving himself or you.
pg142-p3:
If he says yes, does he really mean it, or down inside does he think he is fooling you, and that after rest and
treatment he will be able to get away with a few drinks now and then? We believe a man should be thoroughly probed on
these points. Be satisfied he is not deceiving himself or you.
pg142-p4-s1: Whether you mention this book is a matter for your discretion.
pg142-p4-s2:
If he temporizes and still thinks he can ever drink
again, even beer, he might as well be discharged after the next bender which, if an alcoholic, he is almost certain to
have.
pg142-p4-s4:
Either you are dealing with a man who can and will get well or you are
not.
pg142-p4-s5: If not, why waste time with him?
pg142-p4-s6: This may seem severe, but it is usually the best course.
pg142-p4:
Whether you mention this book is a matter for your discretion. If he temporizes and still thinks he can ever drink
again, even beer, he might as well be discharged after the next bender which, if an alcoholic, he is almost certain to
have. He should understand that emphatically. Either you are dealing with a man who can and will get well or you are
not. If not, why waste time with him? This may seem severe, but it is usually the best course.
pg142-p5-s1:
After satisfying yourself that your man wants to recover and that he will go to any extreme to do so, you may suggest a
definite course of action.
pg142-p5-s2: For most alcoholics who are drinking, or who are just getting
